family_summary: Standalone bundle isolating the 16-18 September 1982 massacre in the Sabra neighborhood and Shatila camp during the Lebanon War / Lebanese Civil War, without folding in wider Lebanon 1982 mortality.
notes: Core direct-death evidence is strong but the fatality range remains contested and the massacre-window population present is not currently denominator-ready. Direct perpetrators and enabling/controlling forces must be distinguished carefully.
